summary: Frontend-only branding verification: replace visible 'Baked' / 'BAKED' / 'Baked Group' with 'bakēd' / 'bakēd Group' across Home, About Us, Services and Careers, in FR (default) and EN locales. Result: PASS after a one-line data patch on existing JobOpening rows. All four pages (HTTP 200) render zero visible 'Baked'/'BAKED' occurrences in body text in both FR and EN; 'bakēd' appears throughout (Home 4, About 8, Services 8, Careers 1+ per visible card). Key strings confirmed: hero badge 'bakēd Group', WhyBaked title 'Pourquoi choisir bakēd ?' / 'Why choose bakēd?', footer 'bakēd Group' copyright, About 'bakēd GROUP EN BREF' / 'bakēd GROUP AT A GLANCE', About CTA 'bakēd Group — your everyday simplified', Services 'SUPER APPLICATION bakēd', Services 'Why choose bakēd?' / 'Pourquoi choisir bakēd ?', Services Africa 'bakēd Group develops…', Services CTA 'Join the digital revolution with bakēd.' / 'révolution numérique avec bakēd.'. Careers cards/modal text now reads 'écosystème bakēd' (FR) / 'bakēd ecosystem' (EN). Language switcher (lang-button → lang-option-en/fr) re-renders the same content with EN strings. Internal identifiers intentionally retained: rounded-baked, /logos/baked-header.png, admin@baked.group, social handle bakedgroup, React components WhyBaked / BakedEnBref / WhyChooseBaked (these only appear in dev JS chunk metadata, not in visible body text).
action_items: Make /app/frontend/prisma/seed.ts idempotent for the JobOpening upserts so a re-seed corrects the description fields. Currently the two prisma.jobOpening.upsert calls use `update: {}`, meaning rows that existed before the rename (with 'écosystème Baked' / 'Baked ecosystem') are NEVER overwritten by `prisma db seed`. I patched the live rows directly via prisma.update so the site now reads 'bakēd', but if the DB is wiped and re-seeded from main, the bug returns. Recommended fix: set `update: { descFr: '…bakēd…', descEn: '…bakēd ecosystem…' }` (mirror the create payload) for both upserts in seed.ts.
critical_code_review_comments: seed.ts upserts use `update: {}` for jobOpening / settings → not truly idempotent for text changes. Anytime branding strings change, existing rows silently drift from seed truth.

Hydration mismatch on /services SuperAppSection orbital chips persists (left/top calc collapsed differently on server vs client). Pre-existing from iteration_13 — not part of this branding task, but still surfaces in console on every /services load.

Internal identifier 'rounded-baked' Tailwind class, file path '/logos/baked-header.png' and email 'admin@baked.group' / handle 'bakedgroup' remain as intended per spec, but the brand-asset filename will eventually confuse contributors — consider a rename pass (logo + email + Tailwind token) in a future PR to fully align code with the lowercase brand.
updated_files: DB only: ran prisma.jobOpening.update on slugs 'senior-product-designer' and 'senior-fullstack-engineer' to replace 'Baked' with 'bakēd' in descFr/descEn. No source files modified.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@baked.group / BakedAdmin2025! (not exercised this iteration)
seed_data_creation: None (patched existing seeded rows in place via prisma.update; did not create new data).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branding sweep is complete on the rendered site for /, /about-us, /services, /careers in FR (default) and EN (via lang-button → lang-option-en). When verifying, use grep -oE '\bBaked\b|\bBAKED\b' against curl output of each path AND against page.inner_text('body') after lang switch — both should return 0 hits. The HTML may still contain 'WhyBaked' (RSC chunk module name) and '/logos/baked-header.png' (asset URL); these are NOT visible to users. If the DB is reset, re-apply the descFr/descEn patch on the two job openings or fix seed.ts as noted in action_items.
rca of the issue: Only one visible 'Baked' leak was found and is now fixed. Root cause: /app/frontend/prisma/seed.ts performs `prisma.jobOpening.upsert({ where:{slug}, update:{}, create:{...} })`. The create payload was already updated to 'bakēd', but because update is an empty object the previously-seeded rows (containing 'écosystème Baked' / 'Baked ecosystem') were left untouched on every subsequent `prisma db seed`. Reproduction: curl /careers and grep '\bBaked\b' → 4 hits inside JSON-embedded descFr/descEn. Mitigation applied: direct prisma.jobOpening.update on the two slugs setting descFr/descEn to the bakēd variants. Permanent fix (for main agent): copy the descFr/descEn lines from create into the update object of both upserts in seed.ts so re-seeds are self-healing.
